backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan HealthCare backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Service, etc.) and exposing shared functions for user management, bookings, services, Stripe payments, access control, and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report JSON documenting implemented features, specifically the hardcoded DatabaseSchemaPage displaying 10 healthcare database table cards with field definitions, PK/FK badges, and Tailwind styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON text file containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, hooks, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Jeevan HealthCare React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes (public, admin, phlebotomist, doctor) with React Query and theme providers wrapping the entire app.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Tests, Orders, Reports, Users, etc.) and guards access by verifying the user has admin or lab executive capabilities before rendering child routes.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentRemin: React component that schedules and displays appointment reminder notifications at 24-hour, 3-hour, and 1-hour intervals before an appointment, and shows a Join Video Call button 15 minutes before online consultations.
frontend/src/components/doctor/DoctorLay: Provides the doctor portal shell with a sidebar navigation and access control, showing an 'Access Restricted' error card if the authenticated user lacks the doctor role, otherwise rendering child routes.
frontend/src/components/DoctorCard.tsx: Renders a doctor listing card with avatar, star rating, consultation mode badges, availability indicator, and a 'Book Now' button using MockDoctor data.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer displaying the brand logo, quick navigation links, service links, and contact information with social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with navigation links, Internet Identity auth, cart badge, user profile dropdown, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetupModal when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/phlebotomist/Phl: Provides the phlebotomist portal shell with a sidebar (Dashboard, My Collections) and redirects unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the home page before rendering child routes.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects name, email, and phone from a newly authenticated user and saves their profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SlotCalendar.tsx: Interactive monthly calendar component for selecting appointment dates, disabling past dates and supporting month navigation.
frontend/src/components/SlotLockTimer.ts: Displays a countdown timer indicating how long a selected appointment slot is held, with urgent styling when under 60 seconds remain.
frontend/src/components/SpecialtyAccordi: Renders an accordion UI listing 16 medical specialty categories (e.g., Primary Care, Cardiology) with their specialists, allowing users to expand categories and select a specialist, which triggers navigation or a callback.
frontend/src/components/TimeSlotGrid.tsx: Displays a grid of 30-minute appointment time slots from 9 AM to 7 PM, marking slots as unavailable, locked, selected, or available based on props and a deterministic mock unavailability function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token when authenticated, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence managing a shopping cart of lab tests/packages, exposing actions to add, remove, and clear items plus computed totals for price, MRP, and savings.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including services, user profiles, admin/role checks, bookings, doctor data, and health packages via a canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlotLock.ts: Custom hook that manages a 5-minute countdown timer lock on a selected booking slot, providing lock/clear functions and remaining seconds state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining the Jeevan HealthCare brand color tokens (using OKLCH) for light and dark modes, plus utility classes for brand colors.
frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts: Exports a shared array of mock doctor objects with fields like specialty, experience, rating, consultation fee, and availability, used across doctor-related pages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component displaying Jeevan HealthCare's mission, vision, story, and core values using cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCRMPage.ts: An admin CRM page for managing sales leads with status tracking (new, contacted, inProgress, converted, lost), search/filter, and add/edit lead dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCustomersP: An admin page for managing customers with CRUD operations, search filtering, and a details dialog that shows associated patients fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: An admin dashboard overview page that displays key operational metrics (orders, users, phlebotomists, reports) fetched from the backend via useDashboardStats.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: An admin orders page that lists all customer bookings with details like address, service description, preferred date, and budget fetched via useAllBookings.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPatientsPa: An admin page for managing patients with CRUD operations, search filtering, vitals lookup, and an add-patient dialog that links patients to customers.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page for managing test reports, displaying mock report data with verified/pending status badges and options to view or verify reports.
Admin page that fetches and displays all diagnostic services/packages in a card grid, showing name, category, and active status using the useAllServices hook.
Admin page that lists all system users fetched via useListAllUsers, displaying each user's name, email, role (with icon), and active status in cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminVitalsPage: Admin page for managing patient vitals with search/filter, a table view of vitals with status indicators, and a dialog for adding new vitals using CRUD mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Displays booking confirmation details after a successful appointment, with options to start online consultation, track home visit doctor, or view post-consultation actions.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Multi-step lab test booking form collecting patient details, address, time slot, and payment method, then submitting the booking and clearing the cart.
frontend/src/pages/BookSlotPage.tsx: Page for selecting an appointment date and time slot for a specific doctor, with slot locking timer and navigation to patient details form.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page showing added lab tests/packages with pricing, savings, and a checkout button that navigates to the booking flow.
Page for selecting a consultation type (online, clinic, or home visit) for a doctor, calculating fees with travel charges and corporate/subscription discounts before proceeding to slot booking.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays the Jeevan HealthCare contact page with phone, WhatsApp, email, address, hours, social media links, and an embedded Google Map.
frontend/src/pages/DatabaseSchemaPage.ts: Renders a visual reference page showing the 10 core MongoDB database tables (collections) with their fields, data types, primary keys, and foreign keys for the Jeevan HealthCare platform.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAnalytic: Doctor analytics page displaying performance metrics (completed consultations, rating, total patients, success rate) fetched via useDoctorDashboardStats with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointm: Doctor appointments page with day/week/month view toggle, listing appointments fetched via useDoctorAppointments with actions to accept, cancel, or complete each appointment.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorConsulta: Renders the doctor's teleconsultation interface with video/audio/chat controls and a tabbed SOAP notes form for documenting patient consultations.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboar: Displays the doctor's personalized dashboard with quick stats (appointments, prescriptions, earnings, rating) fetched via React Query hooks, including loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings: Shows the doctor's earnings summary (total, pending, monthly) and a detailed earnings list fetched from an API, with export functionality and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorHelpPage: Provides a help and support page for doctors with quick-link cards for training, compliance, and support tickets, plus an FAQ accordion and a contact form.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorPatients: Lists the doctor's patients with search filtering, displaying patient details (name, gender, blood group, relationship) fetched via a React Query hook with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileP: Doctor profile settings page with four tabs (Profile, Qualifications, Availability, Settings) allowing doctors to update personal info, education, schedule, and notification preferences.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorConsultationPag: Doctor consultation listing page with search, specialty accordion filter, sort options (rating, fee, experience, availability), and a grid of DoctorCards linking to individual doctor profiles.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx: Specialty-specific doctor listing page that filters mock doctors by URL param specialty, supports search and sort options, and navigates to individual doctor profile pages.
frontend/src/pages/HealthPage.tsx: Interactive health tools page featuring a symptom checker (with severity analysis and recommendations) and a vitals tracker tab, built with tabbed UI and progress indicators.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page displaying quick service shortcuts, health packages (fetched via API), and a 'Why Choose Us' section with tabs and FAQ-style toggles.
frontend/src/pages/HomeVisitTrackingPage: A real-time home visit tracking page that animates a doctor's map position, counts down ETA, and provides in-page chat and call modal functionality.
frontend/src/pages/OnlineConsultationPag: A simulated video consultation page with mute/camera controls, in-session chat with mock doctor replies, file uploads, and a prescription builder with preview.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Lists mock lab test orders with status badges and allows filtering by all/active/completed tabs, with navigation to individual order tracking.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Displays a static timeline of lab order statuses (from booking to report ready) for a given order ID, using check/circle icons to indicate completion.
frontend/src/pages/PatientDetailsPage.ts: A multi-field form page for collecting patient details (type, demographics, symptoms, file uploads) before proceeding to payment for a doctor consultation booking.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page that displays a fee breakdown (consultation, travel, GST, discounts) and lets users select a payment method (UPI, card, net banking, wallet, or pay-at-home) before confirming a booking and navigating to a confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Displays a phlebotomist's assigned sample collections for the day, showing patient name, address, scheduled time, test names, status badge, and a Google Maps navigation button.
Phlebotomist dashboard showing four summary metric cards (total, completed, in-progress, and pending collections) derived from the useSampleCollections hook.
Post-consultation page shown after a booking is confirmed, offering action cards for downloading a prescription, ordering medicines, booking lab tests, scheduling a follow-up, and rating the doctor.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDoctorProfilePa: Public doctor profile page that displays a doctor's details (ratings, specialization, consultation modes, education, languages) fetched by ID, with a button to book a consultation.
frontend/src/pages/RatingReviewPage.tsx: Rating and review page where patients can submit a star rating, written review, and recommendation for a doctor after a consultation, with a success state on submission.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page that lists mock verified lab test reports with order details and provides a button to download each report as a PDF.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Dynamic service detail page that renders content (title, intro, included services, target audience, benefits, and an image) for a given service slug such as doctor-consultation, medicine-delivery, or lab-tests.
frontend/src/pages/TestsPage.tsx: A diagnostic tests catalog page where users can browse, search, filter, and add lab tests to a cart, with support for prescription upload and profile setup modal integration.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom Jeevan brand colors (oklch variables), typography, container queries, animate plugins, and custom font families.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 43) describing the Jeevan HealthCare app's full architecture, tech stack, feature list, role-based dashboards, known issues, and completed feature history.
